narrative:
Circleville 1-C (precinct in Pickaway County) has 935 registered voters, with 50.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.6 percentage points.
